title: How Do Companies Integrate Tools Like OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google AI Into Their Systems?
pageTitle: How Do Companies Integrate Tools Like OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google AI Into Their Systems? — Last Rev
description: A practical guide to the five integration patterns enterprises actually use to embed AI capabilities into their software. From API-driven architectures to agent-based workflows, here's how companies are successfully deploying AI at scale.
author: Last Rev Team
